channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: Ireland mulls crypto safeguards in response to financial risks
item.description: For the first time in seven years, the Irish government released an assessment related to digital assets, noting risks from money laundering, terrorism financing, sanctions violations and bribery.

item.title: Ethereum Foundation Exodus Continues as Co-Director Hsiao-Wei Wang Departs
item.description: Another key figure at the Ethereum Foundation is stepping away from her post, continuing a recent leadership exodus.

item.title: Wealthsimple launches Kalshi-powered prediction market app for Canadian investors
item.description: The offering follows regulatory approval earlier this year and comes as prediction markets face legal challenges from regulators, exchanges and policymakers around the world.

item.title: Ethereum Foundation leadership exodus continues with director’s departure
item.description: Hsiao-Wei Wang’s departure adds to a wave of Ethereum Foundation exits, fueling debate over governance, decentralization and the network’s future.

item.title: Perplexity's AI Agent Now Has a Brain That Learns From Its Own Mistakes
item.description: Brain is a self-improving memory layer that tracks what Computer did, what worked, and what failed—then uses it overnight to make the next task faster and cheaper.

item.title: Bitcoin’s deeply discounted versus AI-stocks, but hawkish Fed risk lingers: Bitwise
item.description: Bitwise analysts say Bitcoin trades in a historical value zone, but hawkish Federal Reserve signals and a competition for liquidity could sideline buyers.

item.title: Ex-Celsius CEO Mashinsky gets U.S. CFTC ban in final resolution with regulator
item.description: Alexander Mashinsky, the founder of failed crypto lender Celsius, had earlier been imprisoned for fraud and is now formally banned from CFTC registration.

item.title: Europe's Crypto Firms Face Squeeze as MiCA Transition Period End Looms
item.description: As the MiCA grace period closes, only a fraction of registered firms hold full licenses, setting up the prospect of a wave of consolidation.

item.title: HIVE Stock Spikes as Bitcoin Miner Lands $220M AI Infra Deal
item.description: The crypto miner has signed a landmark three-year GPU contract with Bell Canada and Cohere—as Canada races to build AI systems it actually owns.

item.title: Kentucky Sues Kalshi, Polymarket as Prediction Market Legal Battle Swells
item.description: Kentucky accused America’s top prediction market platforms of running illegal sports betting operations, joining a growing stack of states.

item.title: Why Bitcoin Titan Strategy's STRC Is Falling to New Lows
item.description: Strategy’s flagship preferred stock is facing pressure, but analysts say that's not yet an existential threat for the Bitcoin treasury giant.

item.title: HIVE secures $220M AI infrastructure contract with Bell and Cohere
item.description: The deal is expected to add approximately $70 million in annual recurring revenue as the company scales its AI-focused operations.

item.title: CME Group sues CFTC over crypto perpetual futures
item.description: The lawsuit targets the federal regulator and Chair Michael Selig, alleging that the Commodity Futures Trading Commissioin is treating cryptocurrency “futures” as “swaps,” posing risks to derivatives markets.

item.title: Bitcoin, Ethereum Traders Grow Even More Bearish as Prices Fall After Fed Decision
item.description: Prediction market traders don't see Bitcoin or Ethereum making their next big moves to higher price targets.

item.title: U.S. agencies seek stablecoin customer-ID rules akin to banks in new GENIUS Act pitch
item.description: The Federal Reserve, Treasury and other regulators have issued a proposed rule that would set identification standards, and it's now open for public comments.

item.title: Bitcoin miners need billions to fund AI ambitions, led by IREN’s $21B gap
item.description: IREN leads public Bitcoin miners with a projected $21.1 billion AI infrastructure funding gap, underscoring the capital-intensive nature of converting mining sites into data centers.

item.title: JUST IN: $180,000,000 worth of crypto longs liquidated in the past 60 minutes. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE5uLU9xVWJzQkJCOUhsMzI5eHpFU3RCQV9MbzZzU0ZDRE9rVkVLRGpRNEtwQWtNZE54N1pNR3k0MWJfVjRybWpsZUlBWHhETTIzRWJWZ0cxS3BNYm5EMEdHX3pB?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: $180,000,000 worth of cry…

item.title: Everyday Savers Bet Big on Bitcoin Giant Strategy's STRC—Now It's Falling
item.description: Everyday investors that own Strategy’s STRC have been drawn to double-digit yields, but the preferred stock’s volatility has shaken some.

item.title: Ethereum Foundation loses another key leader as co-executive director Hsiao-Wei Wang resigns
item.description: Wang's departure follows the resignation of fellow co-executive director Tomasz Stańczak and marks the latest in a string of high-profile exits at the EF.

item.title: Jerome Powell Supports Fed's New Stablecoin Policies—But Chair Kevin Warsh Abstains
item.description: The proposed rulemaking establishes how U.S. crypto companies will have to screen stablecoin customers after the passage of the GENIUS Act.

item.title: Bybit lands on Singapore MAS Investor Alert List
item.description: Crypto exchange Bybit has been added to Singapore’s MAS Investor Alert List, which flags entities that may be mistakenly perceived as licensed or regulated.

item.title: Crypto for Advisors: Trading the bitcoin cycle
item.description: Bitcoin’s 4-year cycle makes DCA costly. Learn why a cycle-smart strategy is essential for advisors to better manage volatility and maximize client returns.

item.title: Bitcoin to $145K by October? Why this 'crazy accurate' 4chan prediction is sketchy
item.description: A viral 4chan Bitcoin prediction appears to have nailed past BTC prices, but edited targets and impossible supply claims weaken its $145,000 call.

item.title: . @hwwonx has been a steadfast contributor to the Ethereum ecosystem for a decade. I still remember her early days in the Ethereum research community, first outside the Foundation and then inside it, and the thought and care she put into making Ethereum r - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZkFVX3lxTE5veE1pOFdyQVhfdFV1VUJlUE9qNDVKbTlKVUsyYzhLRlR5dHdsSEI2eE9fbWlLa1FrSi1MVC0zemZYM2E1R3lPQkFRNjNYRGRjazlyQms4RVJYR3dIT1Ryd045Rldtdw?oc=5" target="_blank">. @hwwonx has been a steadfa…

item.title: BREAKING: $STRC just hit at $85.32, its lowest level ever. It could force Strategy to sell more Bitcoin. STRC is Strategy's preferred stock that pays an 11.5% annual dividend. When it trades below its $100 par value, the market is signaling that the yield is not hi - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTE80aWhrY0d5aWJMZnpNVVpyVE1SUGVqZFJlZ0xfQnNRUlZZRk9ncVVZOUZEWmRNUGRiTkV1VUNRMVZBcnVHMUI4LW1YcWJCNlhNZkRpaTBfWXhZSF91UnlBNXlzQQ?oc=5" target="_blank">BREAKING: $STRC just hit at $85.…

item.title: What happens when ChatGPT becomes the front door to crypto
item.description: ChatGPT could become crypto’s new onboarding gateway, making Bitcoin and wallets easier to use while creating new trust risks.

item.title: After my sabbatical, I have decided to step down as co-executive director and board member of the Ethereum Foundation ( @ethereumfndn), effective today. That time gave me space to reflect on my priorities and the kind of life I want to build next. During my br - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiW0FVX3lxTE1sMFIzMDYtUlZ1SktMTTRHX2h4bzF1U2dyaXFHenE0cjNXbHpibkpSVTVLSGM2bXJMUy1zb2VJXzg3M0d0MXM1cEVFLVdHQlNLRU90cU1RTjJ4NkE?oc=5" target="_blank">After my sabbatical, I have decided to step…

item.title: Ledn to add Tether Gold as loan collateral, expanding Bitcoin-backed lending model
item.description: Ledn’s planned addition of Tether Gold lending comes as tokenized commodities expand, with the sector accounting for nearly 17% of the $43 billion RWA market.

item.title: Algorand unveils roadmap to achieve quantum resistance by 2028
item.description: The announcement reflects a crypto's growing recognition that adopting quantum-resistant cryptography could take years, requiring changes not only to user wallets but also to core protocol infrastructure.

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

item.title: Morning Minute: Crypto Sinks After Hawkish FOMC
item.description: Bitcoin slid to $64k as rate hike odds soared after Kevin Warsh's first FOMC presser. But was it Warsh or Saylor truly driving the selloff?

item.title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: Stellar (XLM) jumps 10% while index declines
item.description: Internet Computer (ICP) fell 4.1% and Sui (SUI) dropped 4%, leading the index lower from Wednesday.

item.title: Alchemy's AI-driven identity and payment service gains access to Visa network
item.description: The AgentCard integration with Visa Intelligent Commerce allows AI agents built on models from any provider, including OpenAI or Anthropic, to effect commercial transactions.

item.title: Capital B shareholders approve up to $120B in financing capacity for Bitcoin strategy
item.description: Capital B shareholders approved up to $120 billion in financing capacity, including equity and credit instruments, to support the company's Bitcoin accumulation strategy.

item.title: Ireland Tightens Crypto Safeguards in New Financial Crime Action Plan
item.description: A new National Risk Assessment names crypto-asset misuse among Ireland's top threats, as a 30-point plan tightens checks on crypto funds.

item.title: Brazil’s Maturing Market Meets Maturing Threats: How Global Crypto Crime Trends Are Landing in Latin America’s Largest Market
item.description: Brazil is Latin America’s largest crypto market, and one of the world’s most dynamic. Between July 2024 and June 2025,… The post Brazil’s Maturing Market Meets Maturing Threats: How Global Crypto Crime Trends Are Landing in Latin America’s…

item.title: Mercado brasileiro amadurece e enfrenta ameaças cada vez mais sofisticadas: como as tendências globais do crime com cripto estão chegando ao maior mercado da América Latina
item.description: O Brasil é o maior mercado de criptomoedas da América Latina e um dos mais dinâmicos do mundo. Entre julho… The post Mercado brasileiro amadurece e enfrenta ameaças cada vez mais sofisticadas: como as tendências globais do crime com cripto…

item.title: Hive shares jumps 10% on $220m Canada sovereign AI infrastructure deal
item.description: GPU cloud contract with Bell and Cohere strengthens HIVE's shift from bitcoin mining to high performance AI computing.

item.title: The great rotation: Investors desert the Magnificent 7, crypto for AI bottlenecks
item.description: Capital is flowing out of the largest tech companies and bitcoin as investors pile into semiconductors, memory stocks and space-related opportunities.

item.title: G7 calls for joint action on North Korean crypto theft, cybercrime
item.description: G7 leaders broadened their warning over North Korean crypto theft to include wider cybercrime as researchers link DPRK-affiliated actors to billions of dollars in stolen digital assets.

item.title: CME to Sue CFTC Over Bitcoin Perpetual Futures Approval: CEO
item.description: Outgoing CME chief Terry Duffy says perpetual futures are actually swaps under Dodd-Frank, and that the exchange will file suit Thursday.

item.title: Bitcoin's nemesis, the Dollar Index, is on the verge of a major breakout
item.description: Your day-ahead look for June 18, 2026

item.title: Aster popped over 10% on radical 'buyback and burn' upgrade. But gains were short-lived
item.description: ASTER sees two-way volatility as bullish protocol-specific news meets hawkish Fed.

item.title: Crypto market positioning is 'defensive and thin' after Fed, Marex analysts say
item.description: While the Federal Reserve held interest rates, Chair Kevin Warsh made it clear the U.S. central bank is more worried about inflation than growth.

item.title: Malta's financial regulator explores bringing parts of DeFi under MiCA's orbit
item.description: The MFSA is seeking feedback on whether decentralization should be assessed as a spectrum rather than a binary concept.

item.title: Bitcoin market cap rebound to take '5-10 years' after dropping 10 places since mid-2025
item.description: Bitcoin could be absent from the world's top five assets by market cap until 2036, despite an estimate seeing the BTC bear market being nearly 70% complete.

item.title: Aztec hit by second $2.1M exploit in less than week: SlowMist
item.description: Security researchers warn that deprecated smart contracts can remain vulnerable long after projects stop maintaining them.

item.title: Bitcoin Steadies Near $64K as Analysts Eye Floor After Hawkish Fed
item.description: BTC slid to around $64,100 after Kevin Warsh's hawkish debut, but analysts argue a $60,000 floor and catalysts could spark a rebound.

item.title: Almost every crypto company will disappear. most of the infra is already built or about to be built. crypto will collapse into bitcoin, ethereum, and maybe solana. the only relevant products will be stablecoins, AMMs, wallets, and perps. ethereum will enable expor - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE9fU2RpQ0xNbTNfSGNDbjdveUlHR0xlekU3aFRDa1JnRlloUDhwbXdjQkVFTldKQzBxc21ZdzFTNDZZOEhEMkx5RGlNYllZS0piNTMwMVpWVWxHTEVyX2M2ellR?oc=5" target="_blank">Almost every crypto company will d…

item.title: Grayscale applies traditional finance models to AAVE, sees $175 value
item.description: Grayscale and CoinShares are applying traditional valuation techniques to crypto assets as institutions explore revenue-generating DeFi protocols.

item.title: The bond market is flashing a clear signal on interest rates. Bitcoin bulls should take note
item.description: The bond market is sending a signal that complicates prospects of a near-term bitcoin bull run.

item.title: Ryan Salame’s wife to face charges over FTX-funded congressional run
item.description: A federal judge has denied a bid from Michelle Bond, the wife of former FTX executive Ryan Salame, to have campaign finance charges against her dismissed.

item.title: Florida man pleads guilty for promoting $1.8B ‘HyperFund’ crypto fraud
item.description: Rodney “Bitcoin Rodney” Burton faces a maximum sentence of five years in federal prison for conspiracy to operate an unlicensed money transmitting business.

item.title: Live markets: price action turns panicky in Saylor's STRC as bitcoin drops below $63,000
item.description: Total crypto market value has held steady near $2.26 trillion since Tuesday, with the recovery losing momentum after the Fed killed rate-cut hopes and spot ETFs swung back to outflows.

item.title: Strategy's STRC preferred stock hits a record low below par
item.description: The slide has paused the above-par share sales Strategy uses to fund bitcoin purchases, and it is the same stock whose dividends forced the company's first BTC sale this month.

item.title: Dorsey’s Block says new AI tool handles 15% of code work
item.description: Builderbot is the “missing layer between AI coding tools and how engineering actually works at scale,” said Brad Axen, head of AI capabilities at Block.

item.title: XRP slips 4% below $1.20 after breakout rally stalls near key resistance
item.description: Heavy selling pushed XRP back through a closely watched support level, though buyers stepped in above $1.17 to prevent a deeper pullback.

item.title: Buying bitcoin below its 200-week average has historically delivered over 100% in median returns, Kraken says
item.description: Bitcoin briefly slipped below its 200-week moving average twice in the past two weeks, a rare event that Kraken says has historically marked strong entry points for buyers.

item.title: Bitcoin, ether slide after a hawkish Fed, even as Trump's signed Iran deal lifts stocks
item.description: The Fed held rates but signaled it is more worried about inflation than growth in Chair Kevin Warsh's first meeting.

item.title: Next bull run will be slower, less volatile as investors' crypto appetite evolves, Bitwise CIO says
item.description: Long-time bitcoin bull Matt Hougan told CoinDesk that during this bear market and with ‘doubts swirling’, investors have found ‘it easier to reach for something more tangible:’ stablecoins and tokenization.
